heading: Content & Newsletter
intro: I'm creating content about software development, creative coding, and the things I'm learning. The goal is to build a library of resources that's genuinely useful.
followHeading: Follow along — I'm publishing on LinkedIn first.
followBody: Videos, write-ups, and honest reflections on the developer journey.

formats.title: Video Walkthroughs
formats.description: Short-form demos and walkthroughs of projects, tools, and techniques — shared on LinkedIn.

formats.title: Write-Ups
formats.description: Posts about what I'm building, the decisions behind it, and things I wish I'd known sooner.

formats.title: Newsletter
formats.description: A regular digest of what I'm learning, links worth reading, and reflections on the developer journey.
